---
title: 'Project 2nd Car'
date: '2011-09-15T19:37:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1045838767373043715'
blogger_filename: '/2011/09/project-2nd-car.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - '2nd Car'
---

I have had 4 debt free cars as an adult. Each progressively better. I am driving a 2002 Saturn L100 now which we purchased with a tax refund. I am ready to&nbsp;receive&nbsp;a debt free car by faith. Not by saving to it, or using a bonus or tax refund, but in a way that only God could have done it.<br />
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/chevy-traverse-ltz-f68524982dcd.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/chevy-traverse-ltz-f68524982dcd.jpg" /></a><br />
Therefore: I believe that I receive a Chevy Traverse LTZ. Cyber Gray&nbsp;Metallic, with Cashmere Color Perforated Leather Interior. Debt Free and Fully Loaded! I am empowered to prosper as I go In and Out of my daily routine, and that includes the car I drive!<br />
DW<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: #9d3300; font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold;"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/deuteronomy/28.html">Deuteronomy 28 (New International Version)</a></span><br />
<br />
<span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;"></span><br />
<h2 class="Subject" style="font-size: 15px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 10px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">


<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/deuteronomy/passage.aspx?q=deuteronomy+28:1-14" style="color: #333333; text-decoration: none;">Blessings for Obedience</a></h2>
<span class="versetext" id="de28-1" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">1</span>&nbsp;If you fully obey the LORD your God and carefully follow<a href="http://draft.blogger.com/blogger.g?blogID=1992799306809150069" name="1"></a>&nbsp;all his commands<a href="http://draft.blogger.com/blogger.g?blogID=1992799306809150069" name="2"></a>&nbsp;I give you today, the LORD your God will set you high above all the nations on earth.<a href="http://draft.blogger.com/blogger.g?blogID=1992799306809150069" name="3"></a>&nbsp;</span><span class="versetext" id="de28-2" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">2</span>&nbsp;All these blessings will come upon you<a href="http://draft.blogger.com/blogger.g?blogID=1992799306809150069" name="4"></a>&nbsp;and accompany you if you obey the LORD your God:&nbsp;</span><span class="versetext" id="de28-3" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">3</span>&nbsp;You will be blessed<a href="http://draft.blogger.com/blogger.g?blogID=1992799306809150069" name="5"></a>&nbsp;in the city and blessed in the country.<a href="http://draft.blogger.com/blogger.g?blogID=1992799306809150069" name="6"></a>&nbsp;</span><span class="versetext" id="de28-4" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">4</span>&nbsp;The fruit of your womb will be blessed, and the crops of your land and the young of your livestock--the calves of your herds and the lambs of your flocks.<a href="http://draft.blogger.com/blogger.g?blogID=1992799306809150069" name="7"></a>&nbsp;</span><span class="versetext" id="de28-5" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">5</span>&nbsp;Your basket and your kneading trough will be blessed.<b>&nbsp;</b></span><span class="versetext" id="de28-6" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><b><span class="versenum" style="margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">6</span>&nbsp;You will be blessed when you come in and blessed when you go out.<a href="http://draft.blogger.com/blogger.g?blogID=1992799306809150069" name="8"></a>&nbsp;</b></span><span class="versetext" id="de28-7" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">7</span>&nbsp;The LORD will grant that the enemies<a href="http://draft.blogger.com/blogger.g?blogID=1992799306809150069" name="9"></a>&nbsp;who rise up against you will be defeated before you. They will come at you from one direction but flee from you in seven.<a href="http://draft.blogger.com/blogger.g?blogID=1992799306809150069" name="10"></a>&nbsp;</span><span class="versetext" id="de28-8" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">8</span>&nbsp;The LORD will send a blessing on your barns and on everything you put your hand to. The LORD your God will bless<a href="http://draft.blogger.com/blogger.g?blogID=1992799306809150069" name="11"></a>&nbsp;you in the land he is giving you.&nbsp;</span><span class="versetext" id="de28-9" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">9</span>&nbsp;The LORD will establish you as his holy people,<a href="http://draft.blogger.com/blogger.g?blogID=1992799306809150069" name="12"></a>as he promised you on oath, if you keep the commands<a href="http://draft.blogger.com/blogger.g?blogID=1992799306809150069" name="13"></a>&nbsp;of the LORD your God and walk in his ways.&nbsp;</span><span class="versetext" id="de28-10" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">10</span>&nbsp;Then all the peoples on earth will see that you are called by the name<a href="http://draft.blogger.com/blogger.g?blogID=1992799306809150069" name="14"></a>&nbsp;of the LORD, and they will fear you.&nbsp;</span><span class="versetext" id="de28-11" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">11</span>&nbsp;The LORD will grant you abundant prosperity--in the fruit of your womb, the young of your livestock<a href="http://draft.blogger.com/blogger.g?blogID=1992799306809150069" name="15"></a>&nbsp;and the crops of your ground--in the land he swore to your forefathers to give you.<a href="http://draft.blogger.com/blogger.g?blogID=1992799306809150069" name="16"></a>&nbsp;</span><span class="versetext" id="de28-12" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">12</span>&nbsp;The LORD will open the heavens, the storehouse<a href="http://draft.blogger.com/blogger.g?blogID=1992799306809150069" name="17"></a>&nbsp;of his bounty,<a href="http://draft.blogger.com/blogger.g?blogID=1992799306809150069" name="18"></a>&nbsp;to send rain<a href="http://draft.blogger.com/blogger.g?blogID=1992799306809150069" name="19"></a>&nbsp;on your land in season and to bless<a href="http://draft.blogger.com/blogger.g?blogID=1992799306809150069" name="20"></a>&nbsp;all the work of your hands. You will lend to many nations but will borrow from none.<a href="http://draft.blogger.com/blogger.g?blogID=1992799306809150069" name="21"></a>&nbsp;</span><span class="versetext" id="de28-13" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">13</span>&nbsp;The LORD will make you the head, not the tail. If you pay attention to the commands of the LORD your God that I give you this day and carefully follow<a href="http://draft.blogger.com/blogger.g?blogID=1992799306809150069" name="22"></a>&nbsp;them, you will always be at the top, never at the bottom.<a href="http://draft.blogger.com/blogger.g?blogID=1992799306809150069" name="23"></a>&nbsp;</span><span class="versetext" id="de28-14" style="display: inline; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 3px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">14</span>&nbsp;Do not turn aside from any of the commands I give you today, to the right or to the left,<a href="http://draft.blogger.com/blogger.g?blogID=1992799306809150069" name="24"></a>&nbsp;following other gods and serving them.</span><br />
<br />
<span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 12px;"></span><br />
<ul id="Page-1" style="display: block; list-style-image: initial; list-style-position: initial; list-style-type: none; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 10px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">
<li style="list-style-image: initial; list-style-position: initial; list-style-type: none; margin-bottom: 15px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><h4 class="ResultTitle" style="clear: left; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">


<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/wnt/2-corinthians/11-9.html" style="color: #3380cc; text-decoration: underline;">2 Corinthians 11:9 WNT</a></h4>
<div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">
And when I was with you and my resources failed, there was no one to whom I became a burden--for the brethren when they came from Macedonia&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="background-color: #ffff96; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">fully</span>&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="background-color: #ffff96; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">supplied</span>&nbsp;my wants--and I kept myself from being in the least a burden to you, and will do so still.</div>
<div class="QuickLinks" style="color: #cdcdcd; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/wnt/2-corinthians/11.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Read 2 Corinthians 11</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/parallel-bible/passage.aspx?q=2%20Corinthians+11:9" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">View in parallel</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/2-corinthians/11-9-compare.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Compare Translations</a></div>
</li>
<li style="list-style-image: initial; list-style-position: initial; list-style-type: none; margin-bottom: 15px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><h4 class="ResultTitle" style="clear: left; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">


<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/csb/philippians/4-18.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Philippians 4:18 CSB</a></h4>
<div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 3px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">
But I have received everything in full, and I have an abundance. I am&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="background-color: #ffff96; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">fully</span>&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="background-color: #ffff96; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 2px; padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">supplied</span>, having received from Epaphroditus what you provided-a fragrant offering, a welcome sacrifice, pleasing to God.</div>
<div class="QuickLinks" style="color: #cdcdcd; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/csb/philippians/4.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Read Philippians 4</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/parallel-bible/passage.aspx?q=Philippians+4:18" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">View in parallel</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/philippians/4-18-compare.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Compare Translations</a></div>
</li>
</ul>
